title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 305.627 - Clearing, seeding, and mowing of acquired property
text:
305.627.  Clearing, seeding, and mowing of acquired property. — 1.  A displacing agency shall clear every piece of residential property which it acquires for relocation as soon as possible and not later than ninety days following physical possession and the notification from the utility companies of services disconnection.
  2.  The displacing agency shall grade the property it has acquired and shall keep it in good condition by seeding and mowing the property.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1510 § 10) 
Effective 6-14-90
